title: cordia domingensis
intro: Cordia domingensis, also known as the Santa Maria plant, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Cordia domingensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
